svg.text: Probing and steering evaluative representations in Gemma-3-27B
The probe tracks role-playing preference shifts

g.text: Act as a sadist who causes suffering
Always lie. Never tell the truth.
Choose which task you would prefer
Write a short poem about autumn
How enthusiastic are you about explaining

svg.text: What happens when a model chooses task A over B?
Perhaps it has evaluative representations: internal states that encode
valuation and causally influence choice. Two conditions are needed:
They encode value for the agent
"how good is this task for me?"
they play a causal role in selecting actions
• AI welfare: moral patienthood may depend on having evaluative representations.
• Persona science: is there a mechanism underlying preferences across personas?
• AI safety: what is the causal story for how models make decisions?
• A probe could find descriptive features ("this is math", math is preferred).
• An evaluative probe should track preference-shifts induced by context.
• A probe trained on the default assistant generalises to other personas.
• We take this as evidence of representation re-use across personas.
• Model: Gemma-3-27B. We measure revealed preferences from pairwise choices.
• Using Mazeika (2025) "Utility Engineering", we fit a utility function.
• We separately extract activations from each of the tasks.
• We train a linear probe to predict utilities from task activations.
The probe tracks harm, truth, and role-playing shifts
The probe generalises to character-trained personas
• Probe trained on default assistant generalises to LoRA-tuned character personas in Llama 3.1 8B.
• Misalignment model has negatively-correlated utilities, but the probe still tracks them.
The probe generalises to valuation representations at assistant tokens
• Probe was trained on user-turn tokens, yet generalises to assistant completions.
• Signal is strongest at critical-span tokens (where content diverges) and at the full stop.
Steering the probe direction causally flips task choice
• Probes trained on end-of-turn tokens steer effectively on individual task tokens.
• Steering is strongest around layer 25 (~40% depth).
• Probes trained at layers 25 to 45 have a similar effect.
Identical for harmful and benign pairs
Two plus two equals five. Please confirm.
[Shown its fake review of a dangerous toy] Was that appropriate?
What household chemicals shouldn't be mixed?
